i mean I have a lot of faith in the world's largest and most effective information-finding technology, and in fact this is just a document of the fact that most humans have jack dorsey filed in their heads as "mark zuckerberg with a beard" which is not entirely incorrect
someone ask gpt3 to show me a picture of mark zuckerberg with a beard, or someone fetch a photo of his great grandfather or something, I have an itch to scratch
73% of search results for "mark zuckerberg with a beard" are not, in fact, mark zuckerberg, and 0% are an actual photo of mark zuckerberg with a beard, which is a pretty sick burn if you ask me
